headline: Analyst Raises Expand Energy (EXE) Price Target to $145
summary: Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) is included among the 14 Best Energy Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. Formed in 2024 by the merger of Chesapeake Energy Corporation and Southwestern Energy Company, Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) operates as an independent natural gas production company in the United States.
